channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: After Venezuela and Iran, Cuba? Trump says it looks like I'll be the one that does it
item.description: He had suggested the opposite a day earlier, saying further escalation isn't necessary after prosecutors announced charges against Raúl Castro.

item.title: Trump reverses grocery, air conditioning pollution regulations as too woke
item.description: The Air-Conditioning, Heating and Refrigeration Institute said the change would inject uncertainty across the market and could raise prices.

item.title: Indian Gen Zers turn online parody account into political movement: the Cockroach Janta Party
item.description: Memes mocking corruption, joblessness and political dysfunction have flooded social media, where millions of users are adopting the cockroach.

item.title: UK government responds to cost-of-living crisis with discounts on theme park tickets and chocolate bars
item.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves declined to pledge additional support for household heating costs.
